strategies.name: Fast A ramp
strategies.description: Hit A quickly from ramp with entry utility.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: 5 A ramp, smoke jungle + stairs, flash over -> go A

notes: ticket stays open so trade quickly

strategies.name: A split ramp palace
strategies.description: Pressure A from ramp and palace.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: 3 A ramp, 2 palace, smoke CT + jungle -> go A

goodWhen: good if 2 players can take the second lane
notes: needs timing between ramp and palace

strategies.name: Mid to connector
strategies.description: Take mid and convert it into connector pressure.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: take mid, smoke window, flash top mid -> go connector

goodWhen: good if 1 player knows the smoke
good if 2+ players will go mid

strategies.name: Silent B apps
strategies.description: Walk B apps and burst with one flash.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: walk B apps, popflash out -> go B

goodWhen: good if the team can stay quiet

strategies.name: Fake A to B
strategies.description: Show A utility then hit B through apps.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: show A ramp, smoke jungle -> rotate B apps

meta.purpose: pull rotation before the real hit
goodWhen: good if the team will rotate together
notes: sell the fake then leave fast

strategies.name: Mid short to A
strategies.description: Take middle and split A through short.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: take mid control, smoke window + short -> go A

goodWhen: good if 1 player knows the smoke
good if 2+ players will go mid
notes: needs one player to clear ladder/short
works well against static A hold

strategies.name: Fast mid to B
strategies.description: Use mid utility and flow into B quickly.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: fast mid, smoke window + connector -> go B

meta.purpose: enter B through a second lane
goodWhen: good if 1 player knows the smoke
good if 2+ players will go mid
notes: need one player to cut market rotate

strategies.name: Full A site hit
strategies.description: Commit to A with core site-blocking smokes.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: A ramp, smoke CT + stairs + jungle, flash over -> go A

notes: ticket remains contestable after smokes fade

strategies.name: Delayed B apps
strategies.description: Hide in apps and hit B after the clock reaches one minute.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: hide B apps till 1:00, then, smoke market door + window -> go B

goodWhen: good if the team will wait for the timing

strategies.name: Palace contact A
strategies.description: Hold palace pressure and burst when A shows weakness.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: 2 palace hold 3 A ramp, then swing A, smoke CT -> go A

notes: best if one player lurks top mid

strategies.name: Underpass to connector
strategies.description: Use underpass to pressure connector while teammates show mid.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: 1 underpass 4 top mid, smoke window -> go connector

goodWhen: good if 1 player knows the smoke
good if 2+ players will go mid
notes: underpass player must not get spotted early
works best with one flash top mid

strategies.name: Fast cat to B split
strategies.description: Use cat pressure to help a B split.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: take cat 2 B apps, smoke market window -> go B

goodWhen: good if 2 players can take the second lane
notes: cat player must arrive with apps hit

strategies.name: Standard 2-1-2
strategies.description: Balanced Mirage setup.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: 2 A 1 mid 2 B

strategies.name: Window mid peek
strategies.description: Take a quick mid info fight from window.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: mid peek window

meta.purpose: get early info and fall back if needed
goodWhen: good if one teammate can trade
good if you have flash support

strategies.name: B apps push
strategies.description: Fight for apps control early.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: push B apps early

meta.purpose: get early info and fall back if needed
goodWhen: good if one teammate can trade
good if you have flash support

strategies.name: A retake setup
strategies.description: Play A to delay and retake instead of hard holding site.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: retake A

meta.purpose: save utility for the A retake
goodWhen: good if the team will save utility

strategies.name: B stack
strategies.description: Gamble extra presence on B.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: stack B

strategies.name: Connector control
strategies.description: Take more active control around connector.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: connector control

notes: needs support flash or top mid info

strategies.name: Double ramp hold
strategies.description: Commit two defenders to stopping A ramp control.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: double ramp hold

notes: one player should still watch palace timing

strategies.name: Mid boost
strategies.description: Use a quick boost for mid info or opening kill.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: mid boost

strategies.name: Save crossfire
strategies.description: Play tight crossfires and avoid risky peeks.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: save crossfire

meta.purpose: protect weapons and avoid isolated duels
goodWhen: good if the team will not overpeek

strategies.name: Short support mid push
strategies.description: Push mid with help from short timing.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: mid push with short help

meta.purpose: get early info and fall back if needed
goodWhen: good if one teammate can trade
good if you have flash support

strategies.name: A passive ticket
strategies.description: Hold A from deeper ticket and jungle angles.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: A hold ticket + jungle

strategies.name: B bench anti-rush
strategies.description: Prepare utility and positions to stop fast B hits.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: hold B anti-rush van + bench
